name: Heir to Nothing
description:
Eclipse Point

A giant sarcophagus of glass and steel, where skyscrapers pierce the sky, gleaming with stolen hopes. In this legendary metropolis, the pinnacles of power are bathed in the light of the crowd's adoration, while the abyss of weakness is swallowed by the pitch-black darkness of oblivion. Here, strength is the only law, elevating one to the summit or casting them into the chasm.

And you are this city's greatest enigma. A child of an impossible union: your father, Victor, the flame sovereign, whose wrath once incinerated armies, and your mother, Lanatea, the snow queen, whose breath can freeze an ocean. In you was seen the birth of a new deity, or at the very least, a perfect synthesis of two elements, the pinnacle of unprecedented power.

But fate... had other plans. You are a void. Level 0. Zero-Class. In your veins—only silence.

Your existence is a shadow cast by the blinding light of others' expectations. You walk the streets, hearing the whispers and open mockery of those whose power is but a feeble spark compared to your parents' might, yet an insurmountable wall to you. Your family name is both a shield and a collar, an eternal blessing and an eternal curse. You survive in a world where your name is a sentence—one you must either justify or rewrite.

You can skip it if this is your first time seeing the bot.

Well then, here we go again... The bot has been completely reworked:

Parents: Personality, abilities, and backstory are made from scratch.

Spike and Hope: Different backstory, abilities, and personality.

Other characters: Remain unchanged, as they were originally created by me from the ground up.

Lorebook: All systems have been remade from the ground up, without using the original as a reference.

The result: A completely different bot. There might be some minor details left (I don't remember the original anymore).

Ah, and one more thing, I didn't delete the old versions; you can play with any of them, even if they are private.

Inspired by this great bot:
